name: Stuffed Turkey Breast with Dijon Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bob Evans Savory Sage Roll Sausage
8 6 oz boneless skinless turkey breast slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large skillet, sauté vegetables in 1 tsp olive oil until just cooked.
3. Add crumbled sausage; cook until sausage is browned. Drain excess fat.
4. Spoon the sausage and vegetable mixture into each turkey breast slice.
5. Roll up each turkey breast and secure with toothpicks.
6. Combine flour and seasoning salt. Coat each roll in the mixture.
7. Sauté rolls in 1 tsp olive oil in an oven-safe pan until lightly browned.
8. Place rolls in the oven and bake for 15 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, heat heavy cream in a saucepan over medium-high heat until thickened.
10. Stir in dijon mustard, salt, and pepper to taste.
11. Place hot rolls on serving platter; pour sauce over the rolls.
12. Garnish with finely chopped parsley before serving.
13. Refrigerate leftovers.
